name: Eggplant-Stuffed Crepes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the onion until translucent.
2. Add the eggplant, tomatoes, vegetable broth, curry powder, cinnamon, and salt. Cook over medium heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Divide the mixture evenly between each crepe.
4. Roll up the crepes and serve hot with Greek Tomato Sauce.
5. Makes 24 crepes.
